2606.14297.title: Pix2Pix-Hybrid: Structure-Guided Conditional Synthesis of Hajj Crowd Images with Multi-Channel Conditioning and Weak Attribute Supervision
2606.14297.paper_summary: Developing accurate crowd-counting models for Hajj pilgrimage scenes remains challenging because domain-specific annotated images are scarce and data collection during large gatherings raises privacy concerns. To address these limitations, this paper proposes Pix2Pix-Hybrid (P2P-H), a hybrid conditional GAN for structure-guided Hajj crowd-image synthesis and data augmentation. P2P-H builds on Pix2Pix and employs a U-Net generator conditioned on eight input channels that jointly encode structural cues (edges and grayscale) and contextual attributes (crowd density and time of day). To capture detailed textures in dense scenes, the framework integrates two multi-scale PatchGAN discriminators operating at different resolutions. The training procedure combines adversarial, perceptual, and feature-matching objectives with adaptive data augmentation and stabilization strategies. The model was trained on 993 real Hajj frames collected from 60 publicly available video sources, with conditioning attributes derived automatically to reduce manual labeling effort. Using this framework, we constructed CrowdH, a synthetic dataset of 10,000 high-resolution Hajj crowd images. Experimental results show that P2P-H improves structure-preserving conditional synthesis quality compared with Pix2Pix and StyleGAN2-ADA baselines and shows favorable transfer to other crowd datasets. To assess downstream utility, we further constructed CrowdH-Mix-469, an annotated mixed real-synthetic dataset comprising 384 real Hajj images and 85 selected synthetic images,and evaluated five crowd-counting models under real-only and real-plus-synthetic training. The selected synthetic data reduced MAE across all five models, with the strongest gain observed for CSRNet.
2606.14297.paper_summary_zh: 開發準確的朝聖人群計數模型在朝聖場景中仍然具有挑戰性，因為特定領域的標註圖像稀缺，而在大型聚會期間的數據收集會引發隱私問題。為了解決這些限制，本文提出了Pix2Pix-Hybrid (P2P-H)，這是一種用於結構引導的朝聖人群圖像合成和數據增強的混合條件GAN。P2P-H基於Pix2Pix，並使用一個U-Net生成器，該生成器基於八個輸入通道進行條件化，這些通道共同編碼結構線索（邊緣和灰度）以及上下文屬性（人群密度和時間）。為了捕捉密集場景中的細節紋理，該框架整合了兩個在不同解析度下運作的多尺度PatchGAN鑑別器。訓練過程結合了對抗性、感知和特徵匹配目標，並採用了自適應數據增強和穩定化策略。該模型在993幀真實的朝聖畫面上進行訓練，這些畫面來自60個公開可用的視頻來源，並自動衍生條件屬性以減少手動標註的工作量。使用這一框架，我們構建了CrowdH，一個包含10,000張高解析度朝聖人群圖像的合成數據集。實驗結果顯示，與Pix2Pix和StyleGAN2-ADA基線相比，P2P-H提高了結構保留的條件合成質量，並對其他人群數據集顯示出良好的轉移能力。為了評估下游效用，我們進一步構建了CrowdH-Mix-469，一個包含384張真實朝聖圖像和85張選定合成圖像的標註混合真實-合成數據集，並在僅真實和真實加合成的訓練下評估了五個人群計數模型。所選的合成數據在所有五個模型中均降低了MAE，其中CSRNet的增益最為明顯。
2606.14297.author: Amirah F. Alshammari et.al.
2606.14297.authors: Amirah F. Alshammari, Bander A. Alzahrani, Nahed A. Alowidi
